Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.caching.settings

Class ProofCachingSettings

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractPropertiesSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.caching.settings.ProofCachingSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
public class ProofCachingSettings extends AbstractPropertiesSettings
Settings for the proof caching functionality.

  • Method Details

    • getEnabled

      public boolean getEnabled()

    • setEnabled

      public void setEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Set whether proof caching is enabled.
      Parameters:
      enabled - value

    • getDispose

      public String getDispose()

    • setDispose

      public void setDispose(String operation)
      Set the operation to be done when disposing a referenced proof. Allowed operations: DISPOSE_COPY, DISPOSE_REOPEN.
      Parameters:
      operation - the operation

    • getPrune

      public String getPrune()
      Returns the current setting for behaviour when pruning into referenced branches.
      Returns:
      either an empty string, PRUNE_REOPEN or PRUNE_COPY

    • setPrune

      public void setPrune(String operation)
      Set the operation to be done when a referenced proof is pruned. Allowed operations: PRUNE_REOPEN, PRUNE_COPY.
      Parameters:
      operation - the operation
